note: Rows are append-only. A correction is a NEW dated row, never an edit to an existing one. Each fresh-capture anchor commits its sample list and every sha256 BEFORE either layer runs.

observations.marking_duty_text: outputs marked in a machine-readable format and detectable as artificially generated or manipulated (Art. 50(2), Reg. (EU) 2024/1689)
observations.grandfathering_status: provisional — Commission FAQ (17 Jul 2026) states 'a targeted grandfathering rule ... If adopted'; Digital Omnibus politically agreed, OJ publication pending as of this anchor
observations.no_retroactive_marking: outputs generated and already made available before 2026-08-02 need not be marked/labelled retroactively (Commission FAQ, 17 Jul 2026)
observations.guidelines_secondary: Guidelines on Article 50 transparency, Communication C(2026) 5054 final, dated 2026-07-20 — SECONDARY (identifier/date from ppc.land; re-verify against primary guidelines text before load-bearing use)
observations.code_of_practice: Code of Practice on Transparency of AI-Generated Content, final published 2026-06-10; voluntary; presumption-of-compliance for signatories

code_technical_measures_secondary.two_layer_marking: at least two machine-readable layers: digitally-signed + timestamped metadata AND an imperceptible watermark (single-layer only in narrow cases)
code_technical_measures_secondary.tier: SECONDARY (ppc.land summary of C(2026) 5054); to be re-verified against the primary guidelines text before any load-bearing use

observations.signatory_mechanism: signatory form to AI Office; per Commission FAQ submit by 2026-07-27 18:00 CEST to appear on the initial list published before 2026-08-02 (a secondary reported 2026-07-22; primary FAQ governs)
observations.provider_postures_secondary: Meta publicly declined the EU AI Act GPAI Code of Practice citing 'legal uncertainties' (Joel Kaplan); OpenAI and Mistral stated they would support the voluntary Code. NOTE: these documented refusals/supports are primarily reported against the GPAI (models) Code, which is distinct from the Transparency-of-AI-generated-content Code this work concerns; provider posture toward the Transparency Code is to be verified against its primary signatory list at anchor A1.

anchors.grandfather_status: doubly grandfathered — outputs made available before 2026-08-02 (no retroactive marking) from systems already on the market (grace to 2026-12-02)
anchors.source: works/2026-07-11-split-seal/ (instrument 014); 15 sha256-pinned specimens, two-layer-scored; see data/specimens.json, data/layer1.json, data/layer2.json
anchors.observation: Reference only — not re-scored this session. Establishes the pre-deadline two-layer state of a fixed specimen set. Its wild AI images (w01 ChatGPT/DALL·E, w02 ChatGPT+DALL·E, w03 MS Designer) are the pre-deadline marking baseline of record.

pending_anchors.action: fresh per-provider capture (N=5 per generative stratum, 3 control) + two-layer score, per README PRE-REGISTERED PROTOCOL
fresh per-provider capture + two-layer score; grace expired
